The mirror was made in England in 1900.
The mirror.
The mirror.
The four strings of pearls.
The four strings are significant of the gauri.
And this smother is presented to you from all the sahaja yogis all over the world.
I should explain the mirror is given on behalf of all the children who are in mother's heart.
I don't think that leaves anyone harmed.
Thank you.
Thank you very much.
Thank you.
Thank you.
Thank you.

Thank you.
Thank you.
I would like to sincerely apologize to our Shri Mataji.
This saree should have been given to Shri Mataji yesterday on the birthday celebrations.
We forgot it.
So on behalf of the sahaja yogis we have just lost our minds.
This is the last time you are not going to give me such expensive sarees.
I am taking sannyasa now in a way.
So you are not going to give me.
And no more of such expensive sarees.
You know, it is too expensive.
Nobody should give me more expensive sarees than a khadi saree.
So please try to give me now sinto saree.
This is the time after the 61st birthday you must take to sannyasa.
So I am taking to it now.
So now this raja yog is over.
It is finished.
And now a new style has started where Maha Lakshmi is over now.
It is Adi Shakti.
And Adi Shakti you know is without any decorations.
So now no more of expensive sarees.
Thank you very much.
